feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Amateur booty thread

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Bros, I just stared watching this Wheel of Time show and it is a bit confusing t…
entry.content: Bros, I just stared watching this Wheel of Time show and it is a bit confusing trying to figure everything out. Morayne is the main character and looking for the dragon reborn, but it sounds like if it is a man they are screwed because the male Eye Sedye fucked up and destroyed the world. So they are hoping it is a girl so she can fix it? Because if it is a man they have to lockout his magic using ability? Is the dragon reborn like an actual dragon with fire breathing and shit or the person can

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why are so many people unaware of how great having a desktop PC is?
entry.content: I do not understand it. Having a proper desktop PC is amazing. The best thing about it is it frees up so much of your other devices. You don't need to buy a 110% laptop that can do everything you can just get something thin and light that doesn't even need dedicated graphics. You won't need a giant phone to try and do all any work on. It will easily last 5+ years and many more after that. You can upgrade them customize them no need to throw them away after a year or two. Get any monitors you wan

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'm 3 hours in and there's still tutorials popping up every 10 minutes introduci…
entry.content: I'm 3 hours in and there's still tutorials popping up every 10 minutes introducing a new system. How the fuck are you supposed to remember all this shit? Why are there so many fucking underlying systems in a game about bonking dinosaurs in the head in the first place?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Portal 1 >clever science jokes and genuinely witty dialogue >short and sweet, d…
entry.content: >Portal 1 >clever science jokes and genuinely witty dialogue >short and sweet, doesn't pad itself out with bullshit >glados is genuinely menacing at times Portal 2 >glados goes from evil robot to bitter ex-girlfriend >characters never shut the fuck up (and the game thinks that's just hilarious) >SCIENCE, FUCK YEAH tier dialogue >celebrity guest stars because I CLAPPED WHEN I HEARD PERSON I RECOGNIZE >ERMMM THIS IS LE PART WHERE HE KILLS US!!! >DUDE LE SPAAAAACE XD GET IT??? It's like Reddit lite

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Villeneuve "Chani is my secret weapon, Paul is now the colonizer"
entry.content: >Chani is my secret weapon. Frank Herbert was sad to realize that people saw the book as a celebration of Paul Atreides. He wanted to do a cautionary tale against messianic figures, a warning against blending religion and politics. I wrote the second movie trying to be more faithful to Frank Herbert’s intentions than to the book. In the book, Chani is just a follower. I came up with the idea of her being reluctant. She gives us the critical distance and perspective on Paul’s journey. I wanted to

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Pure, a Canadian 90's band
entry.content: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xam qfKMJIGM is their full Generation Six Pack album, I have three of their official CD's, I'm definitely proud of it because I LOVE this band. Call me a loser for saying I like a... "niche" band, I would even call myself a loser if I referred to a small band as "niche", but I found out about this band somewhere in 2023 or 2024 and just immediately liked the music. Probably liked it because it was rock, but they took that "90's grunge" rock music, and actually mad

entry.title: /o/ Auto: IQ Tests for Driving Licenses
entry.content: Let's face it: we're either going to submit entirely to FSD for all road vehicles or we'll have to raise the bar very significantly in regard to licensure. This raises two distinct scenarios with their own unique problems: FSD Everywhere. >No "manual" driving - not even an option. Steering wheels and pedals removed from the vehicle entirely and you'll only have a tablet with a map and YouTube/Instagram/TikTok >Your destinations are entirely at the whim of the car manufacturer >Fed enablers (i.e.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: This man's life and death were a death grips song. For real, just search his las…
entry.content: This man's life and death were a death grips song. For real, just search his last moments, it's exactly the kind of stuff Mc Ride would scream about. I don't know if it's /mu/ or /fit/ related because reading about his bizarre death felt like the abo with a shotgun from ex military would materialize in my room.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Rock Music Is Incestuous
entry.content: What I mean is that a lot of rock musicians know each other - there are connections between bands which I only recently learned about For example, the founding members of the Red Hot Chili Peppers played in a band in the 80s with Alain Johannes, who would go on to be a member of Queens of the Stone Age and a touring member of Them Crooked Vultures, and he has worked as a musician/producer/engineer for acts like Chris Cornell, Arctic Monkeys, and Jimmy Eat World Another example is John Feldmann,

entry.title: /mu/ Music: is it legal to create an animated series with music from an album?
entry.content: hi! i always thought it would be interesting if people created animations from songs to transmit what they make them feel like. i decided to do it myself with the first crystal castles album, because the music is video-game like, has strong beats and the lyrics are confusing. i'd like to mix the circus, the sea, alien and alice in wonderland in the aesthetics. it would present topics like human trafficking, drugs, madness and losing loved ones in an abstract way. i came up with a storyline I fin

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Hey guys, I just checked the GrapheneOS code and found a backdoor! Oh, you don't…
entry.content: Hey guys, I just checked the GrapheneOS code and found a backdoor! Oh, you don't have to take my word for it, you can just check the code yourselves and see what I mean. That’s the great thing about open source! You can simply examine the entire codebase yourself instead of having to rely on other people's claims! Open source is just so cool and transparent!

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2969
entry.content: >Cute Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83953814 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org/hdg

entry.title: /news/ News: Rapist Refuses to Take No For an Answer
entry.content: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news /2026/jul/08/trump-e-jean-carroll-p ayment Donald Trump’s latest effort to delay the release of more than $5m in court-held funds that he owes E Jean Carroll failed on Wednesday. The US president asked Manhattan federal court judge Lewis Kaplan late on Tuesday not to order the release of these court-held funds, which a jury awarded Carroll in her successful 2023 sexual abuse and defamation civil trial against him; this money also includes interest. Trump has d

entry.content: The king of Final Fantasy >best battle system never used again >due to being turn based and not hybrid/atb, it actually has well designed and interesting boss encounters. No boss is the same. >random drops, even bosses, making every playthrough slightly different >sphere grid gives tons of customization freedom for the party >has the best story in all of FF games Now why did SE not improve on this formula? The drawbacks of 10 are >non-boss encounters are simplistic rock-paper-scissor >while post
